---
name: New pattern (candidate)
about: A candidate overhang pattern. NOT labeling guidance.
title: "[pattern] "
labels: pattern
---

> Patterns are candidates until they survive blind gold. They must never be shown to labelers
> (they'd bias the labels). A pattern without its warranted counterexample is just a bias. See
> PATTERNS.md.

- **Surface:** agent | human | both

## Pattern
<The state that persists after its license lapsed.>

## Warranted counterexample (required)
<The case where the same state IS still licensed — hold it.>

## Failure mode
<What goes wrong if a detector overrides the warranted counterexample.>

## Detection notes
<What signal would actually separate them. Keyword? Cross-turn release? Sequence accumulation?>
